c.d: The quantity of pre-designed layouts and templates available to users for creating collages.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Appy Pie

c.d: The degree to which users can modify collage elements such as borders, backgrounds, text, and stickers.
The availability and range of built-in tools for editing photos within the app, such as filters, cropping, and adjustments.
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface for creating collages.
The ability to directly share collages to social media platforms.
